detail1: "Razorbaby will land on your head, get rid of it by touching a Bounce Pad."
detail2: - After 30 to 60 seconds, Razorbaby will land on top of the players head. If the player doesn't hit a jumppad within 15 seconds they will explode.
detail3: - Razorbaby is client-sided, meaning it only appears on your client when it spawns. Razorbaby is a chaos enemy and doesn't spawn in the main game.
detail4: - Razorbaby is only obtained by a curse, and is a eviler curse
detail5: "Hey Victim, you know there was a Bounce Pad right next to you, right?"  "Random witnessed Victim get their body blown to pieces."  "Victim had their ears blown out"  "Victim just died. To a baby."
